How to Use Smart Author AI

A 10 steps guide covering app.smartauthorai.net, 99dfy.com.

10 steps • Generated 3/12/2026

This is how the dashboard of Smart Author AI looks like.

1
This is how the dashboard of Smart Author AI looks like.

This is how the dashboard of Smart Author AI looks like. Everything is streamlined, super simple, easy to understand, all in one place.

https://app.smartauthorai.net/Dashboard
2
Email List View.

Email List View.. Step number one, click the Create List button. Step number two, name your list. And step number three, click the Submit button to create a list of email subscribers.

https://app.smartauthorai.net/List
3
Access your mailing list in one click.

Access your mailing list in one click. You can access your mailing list by clicking here anytime. Also, you can download as CSV.

https://app.smartauthorai.net/List
4
Creating a Normal Book.

Creating a Normal Book. you Click Create Normal Book and you will be on this page.

https://app.smartauthorai.net/E_Book/single
5
Name your book.

Name your book. Give your book a name in step number one and in step two click continue to go to the next stage.

https://app.smartauthorai.net/E_Book/single
6
Keyword, Topic, and Template.

Keyword, Topic, and Template.. Step one, put the keyword that will work as the main keyword of your book. Step two- select the DFY Template checkbox. And step three - select a template.

https://app.smartauthorai.net/E_Book/single
7
Final touch: Adding your link.

Final touch: Adding your link. Step number one, add a name of the link. This link will be in the footer of the book. Step number two, put the link. And step three, click the submit button to create your book.

https://app.smartauthorai.net/E_Book/single
8
Your book will be created in a couple of minutes after clicking the submit button.

Your book will be created in a couple of minutes after clicking the submit button. You can view your book by clicking this eye icon.

https://app.smartauthorai.net/E_Book/Lists
9
Viewing Your Book.

Viewing Your Book. Your book will open as a beautiful flipbook. Test your link by clicking the link in the footer.

https://app.smartauthorai.net/E_Book/flipbook/147
10
Success.

Success. The link is working. It took us to the desired website.

https://99dfy.com/1kperdaytraining
